name: lora_optimized_dataset
description: LoRA training on optimized dataset (134 clips: resampled 44.1kHz, LUFS-normalized, spectral matched, HF smoothed, gain-augmented). Tests latent augmentation and schedule variants on top of known-best config (PiSSA, rank=128, lr=3e-4).

experiments.description: Control: known-best config (PiSSA r128 lr=3e-4) on the optimized dataset. No latent augmentation.
Latent mixup alpha=0.4 (MusicLDM). Tests if mixing training latents reduces memorization on 134 clips.
Latent noise sigma=0.02. Mild Gaussian noise on training latents for regularization.
Both latent mixup (0.4) and noise (0.02). Combined regularization.
Cosine LR decay. lr=3e-4 was stable with constant, but cosine may extract more from 5k steps.
Cosine LR + latent mixup. Best regularization combo candidate.
Logit-normal timestep sampling (sigma=1.0). Concentrates training near t=0.5 where flow matching is hardest.
Curriculum timesteps (logit_normal first 60%, then uniform) + latent mixup. Full regularization stack.
